collection.name: HANSOME Genesis
collection.description: The Genesis collection of the HANSOME universe. Every alpaca is its own original individual — sharing the HANSOME look and feel, but with a unique wool shape, head silhouette, ear shape, expression, and fluff. They are NOT the mascot wearing different accessories.

mascotPolicy.rule: The canonical alpaca (mascotBase) is the official HANSOME mascot and the face of the brand. It is used ONLY for branding. There is exactly one mascot. It is NOT part of the NFT collection, is NEVER minted, has no tokenId, and is NOT counted toward the 500 total supply.
generatorMustNever: use the mascot base for any minted token, including Founder #001
produce a base body that replicates the mascot's exact wool shape / silhouette / ear / expression
treat the mascot as the generic base and only swap accessories

everyAlpacaInCollection.mustStillReadAs: clearly the same HANSOME universe (shared palette, proportions, pixel-art rendering, cozy countryside identity)

distribution.notes: CANONICAL Genesis distribution: 470 public + 20 legendary + 10 reserved = 500. Founder NFT #001 is ONE of the 10 Reserved NFTs (not an extra). The mascot is separate: never minted and not counted here.

mascot.notes: The mascot has no tokenId and never occupies any id in the 1..500 range. Branding only.

founder.label: Founder NFT
founder.notes: Founder #001 is hand-designed and is ONE of the 10 Reserved NFTs (counted inside the reserved allocation, not in addition to it). It is a distinct, original HANSOME alpaca — it does NOT use the branding-only mascot appearance. Do not create any additional Founder outside the reserved allocation.

legendaryTokenIds.notes: Exactly 20 Legendary NFTs, each individually hand-designed with its own identity. They are NOT random trait combinations. Their token IDs are pinned in legendaryAssignments before any random generation runs.

reservedTokenIds.notes: 10 reserved NFTs held back from the public generation pool — INCLUDING Founder #001 as one of the ten. Their IDs are set aside up front so they can never land in the public 470. 470 public + 20 legendary + 10 reserved = 500.

randomPool.notes: Only these 470 are procedurally generated from the trait system. Legendary (20) and Reserved (10, which includes Founder #001) IDs are removed from the candidate id set before generation. The mascot is not a token and is never in the pool.

layerNotes.base: The individual alpaca body for this token (from the 'base' category). Each is an original HANSOME alpaca with its own wool shape / head silhouette / ear / expression — NOT the mascot. Every minted token (including Founder #001) uses an original base; the mascot base is branding-only and is never composited into a token. Base art is composited pixel-for-pixel, never smoothed or upscaled.
layerNotes.fur: Wool-style overlay drawn on top of the chosen base (tufts / texture / edge puffs). 'Classic' is a no-op.
layerNotes.necklace: Sits above clothing so a collar/pendant reads over a scarf or sweater.
layerNotes.effects: Ambient foreground elements (butterfly, bee, falling leaf, sparkles). Drawn last, may extend beyond the alpaca silhouette.

baseAnatomyContract.comment: So that hats/glasses/necklaces/etc. line up on every individual, all base-body variants share a common set of anatomy anchor points (crown, eye, ear, muzzle, mouth, neck, chest) within the tolerances below. Variation happens in wool/silhouette/ear/expression AROUND these anchors, not by moving them arbitrarily. Each base may also declare per-base anchor overrides.

anatomy.comment: Pixel coordinates on the 1024x1024 canvas. Originally derived from the mascot; used as the SHARED anchor contract that every base variant aligns to so traits fit naturally.

uniqueness.notes: No two public NFTs may share an identical trait combination. Legendary and Reserved NFTs (Reserved includes Founder #001) are hand-authored and outside this check.

outputs.metadata: NOT generated yet — explicitly out of scope until the trait library is approved.

status.notes: Only a small style-guide review batch has been drawn (5 hats, 5 glasses, 5 clothing, 5 necklaces, 5 backgrounds). Full library, metadata, and the 500-piece generation are on hold pending approval.
